subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! It is the time of dawn, and as I walk through the avenues of New York's garden, thoughts of thee come to mind and remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان دم صبح است و در خیابان باغ نیویورک راه میروم بیاد تو افتادم و بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
